channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pinarayi Vijayan discusses Kerala’s development vision and rejects BJP’s chances in 2026 polls
item.description: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan, in an interview ahead of the 2026 Assembly elections, expressed confidence that the Left Democratic Front (LDF) would secure a historic third consecutive term. ...

item.title: Matildas’ Strong Performance in Women's Asian Cup Despite Heartbreaking Loss
item.description: The 2026 Women’s Asian Cup final saw the Matildas narrowly defeated by Japan 1-0, marking their third final loss to the same team. Despite this, the tournament was a resounding success for Australian ...

item.title: Kapamilya Stars Talk About What Their Regular Day Would Be Like Without Fame
item.description: The article by Liezel Dela Cruz explores a lighthearted question: what would some of the most well-known Kapamilya actresses do if they weren’t famous? It features several ABS-CBN talents—Julia Montes...

item.title: Iran warns of strikes on Gulf energy and water infrastructure following Trump's 48-hour ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has warned it will target energy and water systems in Gulf states if US President Donald Trump attacks its power plants, as stated by officials amid a three-week war that began on 28 February 202...

item.title: How forcing boys and girls into strict gender roles in childhood affects their mental health and behaviour in adulthood
item.description: This article looks at how Kenyan children grow up under heavy pressure to behave in very specific ways because they are a boy or a girl. Boys are told to be tough, not cry, and always look strong, whi...

item.title: Northern Mindanao Hosts Its Inaugural Food and Wine Festival in Cagayan De Oro
item.description: Cagayan de Oro recently welcomed the very first Northern Mindanao Food and Wine Festival, a celebration aimed at showcasing the region’s rich culinary heritage. The festival featured a variety of gour...

item.title: Olivia Attwood and Pete Wicks: A New Relationship Emerges After Split from Bradley Dack
item.description: Olivia Attwood, the well-known ITV presenter, has been pictured kissing her radio co-host Pete Wicks shortly after her split from footballer Bradley Dack. The romance, initially portrayed as a close f...

item.title: Calgary Homeowner Files Complaint as City Investigates Contractor Over Renovation Issues
item.description: A Calgary homeowner has raised serious allegations against a local contractor after what has been described as a renovation nightmare. The homeowner claims that despite paying for a major renovation p...

item.title: Internal tensions and political divisions within President Ruto’s coalition government
item.description: The article likely explored growing internal tensions within President William Ruto’s government, particularly among senior leaders and political allies who were once united under the Kenya Kwanza All...

item.title: ICC confirms review ongoing into misconduct allegations against prosecutor Karim Khan
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has confirmed that allegations of sexual misconduct against its Chief Prosecutor, Karim Khan, are still being examined, even after reports surfaced claiming he h...

item.title: UK Officials Assure Safety Following Reports of Iran's Long-Range Missile Capability
item.description: Housing Secretary Steve Reed has emphasised that the United Kingdom remains secure despite reports that Iran possesses long-range missiles capable of reaching European cities. The warning followed an ...

item.title: Injuries Challenge Young Africans’ Strong Start to the Season
item.description: Young Africans SC, better known as Yanga, are currently facing a tough period in the Premier League as several of their key players are sidelined due to injuries. The team has so far posted impressive...

item.title: Zelensky calls for continued sanctions pressure on Russia as Ukraine-US talks continue
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has called on international allies to sustain pressure on Russia through sanctions, ahead of a second day of discussions between Ukrainian and US delegations on ...

item.title: Highlights from Moss & Fog: Art, Nature, and Design – March 15-21, 2026
item.description: The Moss & Fog publication for the week of March 15–21, 2026, titled 'Fog Signals,' presents a vibrant collection of visually captivating and creatively rich stories that celebrate art, design, nature...

item.title: Meningitis outbreak in Kent shows decline as authorities roll out vaccinations and antibiotics
item.description: Health authorities have reported a decline in the number of meningitis cases in Kent following an outbreak that claimed the lives of two young people. The UK Health and Security Agency (UKHSA) confirm...

item.title: Australia joins global coalition to ensure safe oil transit through Strait of Hormuz amid regional conflict
item.description: Australia has joined 21 other nations in a joint pledge to protect oil tanker movements through the Strait of Hormuz, a vital global trade route currently disrupted by the escalating conflict between ...

item.title: Gor Mahia Poised to Clinch Kenya Premier League Title Ahead of AFC Leopards
item.description: Gor Mahia are looking solid in the Kenya Premier League this season after extending their unbeaten run to 15 games following a 2-1 win over Shabana FC on March 21. This victory pushed them to 56 point...

item.title: Three arrested after fire breaks out once again at Gul Plaza Karachi
item.description: On March 22, 2026, three individuals were arrested after a massive fire broke out once again at Karachi’s Gul Plaza shopping centre. The fire began in the basement of the building, with emergency serv...

item.title: Ruto's upcoming foreign trips set to cost taxpayers an extra Sh3.1 billion
item.description: Taxpayers in Kenya are set to spend an additional Sh3.1 billion to support President William Ruto's planned foreign trips in the last two months before the end of the current financial year, according...

item.title: David Suzuki Reflects on a Lifetime of Environmental Advocacy and Climate Challenges
item.description: As he marks his 90th birthday, Canadian environmentalist David Suzuki reflects on a life devoted to science communication and environmental advocacy. Over decades, Suzuki has worked to raise awareness...
